excerpt: In this post, we walk through a few ways that Quick delivers on this promise. We cover the entire sales cycle, from identifying your highest-priority prospect, contacting them, working the deal to close, and keeping the CRM up to date as the account matures, while protecting your scarcest resource: your time.

title: Transform your sales organization with Amazon Quick: your new agentic AI teammate
